sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 14:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 14:1
items.html: Because the light of Einayim does not shine to the posterior vessels, but to the anterior vessels, which are above the Tabur, which are here up to the Peh. The lower seven are all regarded as from the Tabur downward because the AHP went out and became the phases of HGT. However, some illumination comes to them through the sides, as light of Hassadim. (Inner Light, Item 25)
